creator: marisa@dangr.zone
text:
svnmir.bme.freebsd.org has an AAAA entry for 2001:41c8:112:8300::e6a:0 but doesn't allow connecting via IPv6.
This means that the SVN client will try (and fail) to connect via IPv6 and not via IPv4, since IPv6 will be preferred over IPv4.


marisa@mahou-no-mori[/usr/ports]$ svn relocate https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head
svn: E170013: Konnte nicht mit Projektarchiv bei URL »https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head« verbinden
svn: E000065: Fehler beim Ausführen des Kontextes: No route to host

marisa@mahou-no-mori[~]$ host svnmir.bme.freebsd.org      
svnmir.bme.freebsd.org has address 213.138.116.72
svnmir.bme.freebsd.org has IPv6 address 2001:41c8:112:8300::e6a:0
svnmir.bme.freebsd.org mail is handled by 0 .

marisa@mahou-no-mori[~]$ ping6 -c4 svnmir.bme.freebsd.org 
PING6(56=40+8+8 bytes) 2003:e8:1708:eb68:fa94:c2ff:fec1:d81f --> 2001:41c8:112:8300::e6a:0

--- svnmir.bme.freebsd.org ping6 statistics ---
4 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100.0% packet loss

marisa@mahou-no-mori[~]$ ping -c4 svn.freebsd.org  
PING svnmir.geo.freebsd.org (213.138.116.72): 56 data bytes
64 bytes from 213.138.116.72: icmp_seq=0 ttl=49 time=28.743 ms
64 bytes from 213.138.116.72: icmp_seq=1 ttl=49 time=28.696 ms
64 bytes from 213.138.116.72: icmp_seq=2 ttl=49 time=30.184 ms
64 bytes from 213.138.116.72: icmp_seq=3 ttl=49 time=29.729 ms

--- svnmir.geo.freebsd.org ping statistics ---
4 packets transmitted, 4 packets received, 0.0% packet loss
round-trip min/avg/max/stddev = 28.696/29.338/30.184/0.639 ms
